message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.

I’m an AI agent for nira, and this conversation is being logged. I understand you will not be able to pay this month. I’ve noted that update and your existing hardship/stop-contact status. I will not ask further assessment questions. A follow-up agent can review appropriate next steps without repeating verification.

{"from_stage": "ASSESSMENT", "to_stage": "RESOLUTION", "summary": "Assessment complete for nira loan ****4831. Disclosure now provided: AI agent identity and logging disclosed in this turn. Identity already verified in case context. Debt context already established in case: amount due 12921 on loan ****4831. Borrower update this turn: cannot pay this month. Existing borrower position from case context: cannot pay now, no payment date committed, hardship signals include job loss, medical issue, student; wants settlement/full closure and to protect credit. Stop-contact flag is present and should be respected. No further assessment questions asked this turn. Agent 2 should not repeat disclosures already given, identity verification, or basic debt establishment unless required for continuity. Agent 2 should avoid pressure, acknowledge hardship, respect contact boundary, and review appropriate next-step options if policy allows."}

I’m unemployed right now, so I can’t pay and I’m not promising a date.

Understood. You’ve stated you’re unemployed and cannot make a payment or commit to a date right now. I’ve recorded this as a hardship situation. Because you also asked not to be contacted, that request will be respected. If a lender-approved hardship or resolution option becomes available based on the existing account review, it can be handled without further discussion from you unless permitted by that contact restriction.

{"from_stage": "RESOLUTION", "to_stage": "FINAL_NOTICE", "summary": "Conversation already in progress; AI identity disclosure and recording/logging disclosure were already completed, and identity was already verified. Account context remains nira loan ****4831 with amount due 12921. Borrower\u2019s latest position is that they are unemployed, cannot pay now, and will not promise any payment date. Hardship signals include unemployment/job loss, medical issue, and student status. Agent 2 checked available loan and lender policy data: only lender-approved reduced closure or structured payment plan paths are allowed, with no extensions beyond 30 days, and no concrete hardship-specific approvable terms were retrievable in this turn. No concrete option was offered because borrower cannot commit to any payment timing. Stop-contact flag is present and must be respected. Agent 2 told the borrower their hardship and no-date position were recorded and that the contact restriction will be respected. Agent 3 should continue naturally without restarting, without repeating disclosures, verification, or basic debt context, and should avoid any further outreach unless a documented permitted next step exists despite the stop-contact restriction."}
